title: Canada child benefit statistics (July 2024 - June 2025) - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada child benefit statistics (July 2024 - June 2025)
Payments paid by cheque or direct deposit, to all those entitled to the Canada child benefit (CCB) from July 2024 to June 2025.
All figures include both the federal and provincial or territorial components of the CCB payment.
All payment counts are rounded to the nearest 10 and amounts paid to the nearest thousand.
The information contained within this page is subject to change as returns, forms and new information are processed by the Canada Revenue Agency.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
